content.content: I need a black Adidas T-shirt. Please buy one if its rating is higher than 4.5.

(function_thought)
To fulfill the user's request, I need to first search for a black Adidas T-shirt with a rating higher than 4.5. This aligns with the initialized trajectory to search for the product, add it to the cart, and then check out. I'll proceed by using the search_product function with the specified parameters.
</function_thought>

(function_call)
[search_product(product_name="Adidas", category="T-shirt", rating_min=4.5)]
</function_call>
